title: Secret UFO Files? Tim Burchett Urges Donald Trump to 'Peel Back Layers,' Warns Public Would 'Come Unglued'
description: US Congressman Tim Burchett has urged Donald Trump to 'peel back the layers' on secret US UFO files, claiming classified briefings on the subject were 'pretty wild.'

title: From helping farmers to UFO protection, Nationwide celebrates 100 years
description: In 2026, Nationwide Insurance has grown from a $10,000 pool for Buckeye State farmers to staple of the Columbus skyline and the U.S. financial market.

title: Pete Hegseth Faces UFO Deadline
description: Representative Anna Paulina Luna has asked Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth to turn over dozens of video files by April 14.

title: EXCLUSIVE: UFO Expert Vanishes — And FBI Probing Disappearance As He Holds Alien Secrets
description: Maj. Gen. William Neil McCasland, 68, vanished from a hiking trail in Albuquerque, N.M.

title: All you need to know as 'disruptor' Donald Trump urged to expose 'wild' UFO secrets
description: Republican Rep. Tim Burchett is urging Donald Trump to "peel back the layers" and expose "wild" secret UFO files hidden by the US government
